    A

    addBody(StringBuilder, Method) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Adds a method body with default return values
    addConstructors(StringBuilder, Class<?>) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Adds constructors to the generated class.
    addExceptions(StringBuilder, List<Class<?>>) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Adds exceptions to a method or constructor signature.
    addMethods(StringBuilder, Class<?>) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Filters and adds method implementations to the generated class.
    addParameters(StringBuilder, List<Parameter>) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Adds parameters to a method or constructor signature
    addReturn(StringBuilder, String) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Adds a return statement to a method body
    addSuper(StringBuilder, List<Parameter>) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Adds a super constructor call to constructor

    Compiles files with the given dependencies
    createMethods(HashSet<Method>, StringBuilder) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Creates implemented methods for all abstract methods

    I

    implement(Class<?>, Path) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Generates a default implementation of given interface or extension оf given class
    implement(Class<?>, Path) - Method in interface info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor.Impler
    Produces code implementing class or interface specified by provided token.
    implementJar(Class<?>, Path) - Method in class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Generates a JAR file which have the implementation of the given class or interface.
    implementJar(Class<?>, Path) - Method in interface info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor.tools.JarImpler
    Produces .jar file implementing class or interface specified by provided token.
    Implementor - Class in info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor
    Implementation of Impler and JarImpler interfaces The class provides some functions like: - Generate default implementations of classes and interfaces - Compile and package the generated files into JAR files
    Implementor() - Constructor for class info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
    Default constructor for class Implementor
    Impler - Interface in info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor
    Generates class implementation by type token of class or interface.
    ImplerException - Exception Class in info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor
    Thrown by Impler when an error occurred.
    ImplerException(String) - Constructor for exception class info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor.ImplerException
    Creates an ImplerException with specified error detail message.
    ImplerException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor.ImplerException
    Creates an ImplerException with specified error detail message and a cause.
    info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor - package info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor
     
    info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor - package info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor
    Tests for Implementor homework of Java Advanced course.
    info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor.tools - package info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor.tools
    Tests for Jar Implementor homework of Java Advanced course.

    J

    JarImpler - Interface in info.kgeorgiy.java.advanced.implementor.tools
    Builds jar-file containing compiled implementation generated by Impler.
